title: Semiconductor concentration
question: When one stock supplies half an index's gain — and do winners persist?
finding: NVDA is half the semis index (50% of the gain, 46% weight; top-3 = 76%), more concentrated than the Nasdaq — and winners do NOT keep winning year to year (Spearman IC −0.001; prior losers slightly beat prior winners). A risk fact, not a timing signal.
